method: Multi-N convergence test of campaign-consistent lattice scalar invariants (R_bar, bar_S_g, bar_epsilon_g, Delta_curv from the A2 pipeline) across 7 regimes P0..P6.

branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Einstein-equation source residual / GR emergence diagnostic; T_00, G_00, Lambda_t are matter-side / source-side per P4 manuscript
